Wednesday 3 December 2025 | Finance and Expenditure Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Inland Revenue Department

Hearing of evidence:

Inland Revenue Department

Peter Mersi, Commissioner of Inland Revenue
David Carrigan, Deputy Commissioner, Policy
James Grayson, Deputy Commissioner, Customer & Compliance Services – Individuals
Lisa Barrett, Deputy Commissioner, Customer & Compliance Services – Business
Nick Bradley, Enterprise Leader, Finance Services
